data.body: Investigation complete: Bug is NOT reproducible. (1) .claude/tmp/ does not exist and no code writes review-diff-*.patch there. (2) Review diffs are written to /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/ (outside repo) as .txt files. (3) .gitignore already excludes .claude/tmp/. (4) merge-to-main.sh dirty check uses --exclude-standard which honors .gitignore. The described scenario cannot occur with current code. Closing as invalid.
